feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Extended Warehouse Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Extended Warehouse Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Inbound Delivery 180000013 could not be distributed Message No. VL589
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

While saving inbound delivery in S4 system I am getting the message: ‘Inbound Delivery XXXXXX could not be distributed Message No. VL589’.

I have checked in VL32N -->Edit-->check distribution document and it tells me: 'The delivery cannot be distributed (see the subsequent message) Message No. VL452'.

I wonder the interface between ECC and EWM is not well configured.

Has anyone had similar experience and got the accepted solution?

Thanks a lot!

Vincent

entry.title: LIKP-TM_WHSE_EXEC value is not getting updated with the value 03 when outbound delivery saved in S4
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a decentralized WM system integrated with SAP S4 HANA, As soon as outbound delivery created the delivery data will be distributed through an IDOC via output type and the delivery distribution flag(LIKP-VLSTK) should be set to B(distributed) from D(Planned for Distribution)  and warehouse execution status( LIKP-TM_WHSE_EXEC) should be set to '03'(Delivery is in Warehouse Processing). 

we are using SAP standard FM: SHP_CHG_DLV_DISTRB_STATE in the output type driver program to set the delivery distribution flag(LIKP-VLSTK)  from D(Planned for Distribution) to B(distributed) which is happening as expected.

As per standard behavior the warehouse execution status( LIKP-TM_WHSE_EXEC) should be set to '03'(Delivery is in Warehouse Processing) as soon as LIKP-VLSTK value set to B. But  it is not happening .

Seeking your advice if anything is missing from config side or any other suggestions ?

entry.title: Is SAP Stock Room Management compatible with Handling Unit Management and Serial Number Management?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am currently working on a project involving SAP Stock Room Management in S/4HANA. I would like to confirm whether Stock Room Management is fully compatible with Handling Unit Management (HUM),  Serial Number Management functionalities and Fiori applications. 

From the SAP documentation, it is not fully clear whether it's compatible or not.

Has anyone successfully implemented HUM and Serial Number Management with Stock Room Management?

Any official SAP reference or clarification would be highly appreciated!

Thank you in advance for your support!

entry.title: Adding Serialization Procedure in serial number profile
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

If we add this procedure HUSL ( Maintain serial number at Handling unit level in S/4 and communicate to EWM)  to an existing serial number profile,

can we still have stock and open deliveries in our EWM warehouse for products with this serial number profile? Or will we need to close all documents and remove stock in order for this procedure in a productive environment .

I know when  change the serial number tracked  at document level or stock level would definitely need to do above steps ( removing the inventory , close open documents ) 

Thanks

KB

entry.title: How to obtain Packing Time Stamp on Outbound Delivery Status DPC in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Hi

I am currently using SAP EWM module on SAP S/4 HANA Release 1809, and we observe that in the Monitor, when we click on Outbound Delivery,on the Status tab all statuses are displayed like Time Stamp of picking completed, time stamp of Good Issue , excpet Pack Time DPC , how can I obtain Pack time DPC Stamp in a simplest way. 

The meaning of pack time should be when all the products in the outbound delivery positions are packed in a Shipping HU and packing of all products is completed. 

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Deactivate EWM for SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi SAP team,

Our client is thinking of deactivating EWM for their SAP Public cloud system but we are not able to find any guidelines regarding this. Would you be able to help with the action items if we proceed with this deactivation? Will it be easily done through configuration or do we need SAP help? Thank you.

entry.title: Is it possible to create recurring appointments in SAP EWM DAS.
entry.content:
Is it possible to create recurring appointments in SAP EWM DAS.

Example - Carrier is coming daily at 11:00 AM, Mon to Friday for 1 year. Requirement is an appointment is created automatically by the system daily. I can't see any option in the create Appointment - Textual in FIORI for the same.

Also I read the below in Warehouse Management with SAP S/4HANA: Embedded and Decentralized EWM, Third Edition

The longest loading appointment should be assigned to a maximum of seven days. But how this can be achieved.

entry.title: EWM PPF Change Output Device
entry.content: We have PPF condition records setup in EWM and when triggered, PPF is sending output to wrong output device. Can someone provide steps on how to navigate to PPF condition and change output device being used?

entry.title: bin-to-bin movement task to be auto-created after a UD is posted in QM
entry.content:
### Here's what WE need to know:


 


#### ✅ **What We Did.


 


1. **GRN** is posted → triggers **Put-away** in EWM.


2. Material goes to **clarification zone/bin** (likely due to quality inspection type set up in material master).


3. **Inspection lot** is automatically created via QM integration.


4. After **manual UD (Usage Decision)**, we’re doing a **manual bin-to-bin** to move material from clarification zone to final bin.


 


#### ❓ **Our Requirement:**


 


We want the **bin-to-bin movement task to be auto-created** (and optionally auto-confirmed) after a **UD is posted in QM**.


 


In this Grow with SAP (Public Edition) Embedded EWM is it possible to configure or not? If any feasibilities in this system then please help us to share the proper documents on it.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Express document:Update was canceled while repacking in PRDI EWM
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

while repacking the product in PRDI , user getting the popup with Update was canceled -The error is “database access Table LIME/NSERIAL, operation I “.

this is the serialized product at inventory level .

please help and give your inputs if any

entry.title: Different document type for SAP EWM and 3rd party warehouse for PO and INB
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am working on SAP S4HANA, we have 2 different warehouse systems doing goods receipt. One is SAP EWM and one is a 3rd party system. Process from creating a PO till an inbound delivery is same.

Shall I create a different PO and inbound delivery type for process differenciation? 

or what is recommended as I want to perform a setup.

Thank you!

entry.title: How to move a multilevel HU from IM storage location to EWM (embedded)?
entry.content:
Hello All,

How can we move a multilevel HU from an IM storage location to an EWM (embedded) with custom ABAP code? The standard API MoveHandlingUnits doesn't support multilevel HUs. We have tried BAPI HU_CREATE_GOODS_MOVEMENT, but it returns the same error as when we use VLMOVE: "Posting of decentralised storage locations is not possible."
Thanks!

entry.title: Inbound and Outbound Delivery Creation at the Time of the Production and Process order confirmation
entry.content:
Business has a requirement to automatically creation of IBD and OBD at the time of confirmation of the Production and Process order. So, the IBD and OBD can be Process in SAP EWM and Stock can be issue from PSA location of the warehouse. With Other Imp Config Nodes we have to maintain below nodes also

We have to assign Plant as a Supplier with Movement type, warehouse and Delivery type combination

No vendor defined in Table T321 for ref. movement type 521"

Please check the customizing of the Decentralized WMS Integration:
Logistics Execution
> Decentralized WMS Integration
   > Central Processing
      > Application
         > Inventory Management Interface and Delivery-Relevant Data
            > Define Default Values for Each Reference Movement Type

entry.title: No unique partner found for plant 0001,
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

While mapping Storage Location from ERP system to EWM i am getting "No unique partner found for plant 0001" even though i have created a unique BP as in identification tab Ihave provided CRM011 with my plant that is unique.(checked in BUT0ID table) .

Also, i have assigned Business partner to plant in ERP INTEGRATION-GENERAL SETTINGS-ASSIGN BP TO PLANT.

THANKS & REGARDS

GOURAV

entry.title: /SCWM/MIGRATION119
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

While uploading file for EWM PRODUCT MASTER through /scwm/mig_product i am getting No Business Partner found for Warehouse number X. Any idea what i am doing wrong?

 

Thanks & Regards 

GOURAV

entry.title: Different delivery types DIG DOG not possible in one document in MIGO
entry.content:
Hi

We have created Work Order in IW31 for Refurbishment Process. Then While Posting Goods Issue in MIGO with 261 Movement Type and Getting error.

Different delivery types DIG DOG not possible in one document.

entry.title: bin division/separation without HUs?
entry.content:
hello,

is it possible to have a bin divided into a specific number of sections without using the HU concept (like Storage Behavior: Pallets, storage bin type depth)? Storage type should only be allowed for products being stored without HUs.

Thank you.

Regards

PAT

entry.title: \/SCWM/TO_CREATE OVER PICKING
entry.content:
We developed a PDA program that picks using CALL FUNCTION /SCWM/TO_CREATE.
However, OVER PICKING sometimes occurs.
Can you make sure that it doesn"t happen?

  DATA lt_create_exc TYPE /scwm/tt_conf_exc.

  IF ls_item-fr_huident NE ls_item-to_huident
    AND ls_item-to_huident IS NOT INITIAL.

    APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_create_exc ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_create_exc>).
    <fs_create_exc>-exccode   = 'CHHU'.
    <fs_create_exc>-buscon    = 'TPI'.
    <fs_create_exc>-exec_step = '02'.
  ENDIF.


  DATA: lt_ltap_vb  TYPE /scwm/tt_ltap_vb,
        lt_bapiret  TYPE bapirettab,
        lv_severity TYPE bapi_mtype.

  SET UPDATE TASK LOCAL.
  CALL FUNCTION '/SCWM/TO_CREATE'
    EXPORTING
      iv_lgnum       = ls_item-lgnum
      iv_update_task = abap_off
      iv_commit_work = abap_off      
      iv_wtcode      = space  
      it_create      = lt_create
      it_create_exc  = lt_create_exc
    IMPORTING
      et_ltap_vb     = lt_ltap_vb
      et_bapiret     = lt_bapiret
      ev_severity    = lv_severity.

entry.title: Unable to assign packaging material type
entry.content:
I created a packaging material using MM01 and selected material type as VERP packaging however, when I'm packing other material in PRDI the system is showing error while giving the packaging material as PKG. Error: PKG is not a packaging material. Please enter a valid packaging material. I also extended the material to EWM using MAT1

The above one is the material created by me. Check the packaging material data.



This is material created by someone else. Packaging material type is populated in this.

Please help, due to this I'm unable to pack the inbound/outbound delivery items in HUs.

@SAPSupport @narayanan_kchandran @Ilina

entry.title: Duplicate stock exits in QI stock same as Unrestricted stock after UD is completed
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

We need your help in one of the issue/ issues:

The UD was completed and the stock is in Unrestricted, but there the whole problem starts, to add the surprise, the same stock is present in QI as well. There is no pending UI. We checked in EWM via ERP stock check and we found that there is no stock in EWM. And we also saw in material documents that were posted, and saw 712 Mvt was posted (which seems to be trial for tock reconciliation).
